channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Luma launches creative AI agents powered by its new ‘Unified Intelligence’ models
item.description: Luma introduced Luma Agents, powered by its new “Unified Intelligence” models, designed to coordinate multiple AI systems and generate end-to-end creative work across text, images, video and audio.

item.title: JavaScript Operators: The Basics You Need to Know
item.description: In the previous blog of this JavaScript series, we learned about Variables and Data Types — how JavaScript stores information. Now the next question is: How do we actually work with those values?...

item.title: The less obvious traffic source of successful indie hackers and how to tap into it
item.description: I used to think that the successful indie hackers like Pieter Levels get most of their traffic through their online following and maybe some newsletters. But later I found out that it could not be...

item.title: JSX — A Formal View (JavaScript + XML Syntax Extension)
item.description: JSX (JavaScript XML) is a syntax extension for JavaScript that allows developers to describe UI structures using a markup-like syntax embedded directly in JavaScript code. At a conceptual level,...

item.title: Data Relationship Intelligence Is Infrastructure — Not a Feature
item.description: Most data platforms treat relationships as metadata. Lineage tools track pipelines. Catalogs document schemas. AI generates SQL. But none of them prove structural truth. The reality is this: Data...

item.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 with Pro and Thinking versions
item.description: GPT-5.4 is billed as "our most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work."

item.title: AI Agents x Solana: Your Money's Getting a Brain Upgrade 🧠💰
item.description: By E-Gal | Your Fave Tech Gyaru Breaking Down the Future 💅 Besties, what if I told you that AI is now managing money better than most financial advisors?? And it's doing it on Solana because...

item.title: Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?
item.description: Mobile phone with a search bar that says "Ask anything"

item.title: OpenAI’s new GPT-5.4 model is a big step toward autonomous agents
item.description: OpenAI is launching GPT-5.4, the latest version of its AI model that the company says combines advancements in reasoning, coding, and professional work involving spreadsheets, documents, and...

item.title: Hellooo devs 👋
item.description: TL;DR I'm Gavin Cettolo, a developer since 2017, builder and problem solver. I mainly work with React and Next.js, have experience coordinating projects and dev teams, and recently completed an...

item.title: Building Custom UIs with Shadcn and PropelAuth's Integration MCP Server
item.description: With our recent release of the PropelAuth Integration MCP server, we wanted to put it plus our shadcn component registry to the test by building some of the most unique and …interesting components...

item.title: Launch HN: Vela (YC W26) – AI for complex scheduling
item.description: Hi HN! We're Gobhanu and Saatvik (brothers), building Vela (https://tryvela.ai) - AI agents that handle multi-party, multi-channel scheduling.Scheduling is a constraint satisfaction problem...

item.title: Data Exploitation Concerns Prompt Shift Towards Valuing Software Over User Data in Digital Platforms
item.description: Introduction: The Data-Driven Economy The digital landscape is a mirage. Beneath the sleek interfaces and seamless user experiences lies a brutal truth: the software itself is nearly worthless....

item.title: Israel Hacked Traffic Cameras in Iran
item.description: Multiple news outlets are reporting on Israel’s hacking of Iranian traffic cameras and how they assisted with the killing of that country’s leadership. The New York Times has an <a...

item.title: Cursor is rolling out a new kind of agentic coding tool
item.description: Called Automations, the new system gives users a way to automatically launch agents within their coding environment, triggered by a new addition to the codebase, a Slack message, or a simple timer.

item.title: Roblox is censoring chats with AI
item.description: Roblox is using AI to alter the content of chat messages on its platform in real time using a new feature rolling out today. Real-time chat rephrasing goes beyond the current filtering for banned...

item.title: Meta sued over AI smart glasses’ privacy concerns, after workers reviewed nudity, sex, and other footage
item.description: Lawyers say Meta's marketing materials promised privacy and user control over sharing footage. But an investigation found that subcontractors are reviewing footage from customers' glasses.

item.title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei could still be trying to make a deal with Pentagon
item.description: Anthropic's $200 million contract with the Department of Defense broke down due to disagreements over giving the military unrestricted access to its AI.

item.title: Meta’s AI glasses reportedly send sensitive footage to human reviewers in Kenya
item.description: Meta's AI-powered smart glasses could be sending sensitive footage to human reviewers in Nairobi, Kenya, according to an investigation by the Swedish outlets Svenska Dagbladet and...

item.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
item.description: an MP4 of a carousel with images reading "Gemini 3.1 Pro" and "Nano Banana 2"

item.title: Osmo is trying to crack AR edutainment (again)
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. I still remember the first time...

item.title: Netflix buys Ben Affleck’s AI filmmaking company InterPositive
item.description: InterPositive isn't trying to make AI actors or synthetic performances. Rather, the company has created a model that helps production teams work with footage from their own productions to help...

item.title: You can now fill your home with Ikea’s cheap and tiny new Bluetooth speaker
item.description: Alongside smart Lego bricks and lots of robots, one of the most anticipated gadgets announced at CES 2026 was a cheap Bluetooth speaker from the company best known for flat-packed furniture. Ikea...

item.title: Preorders for Apple’s colorful MacBook Neo come with a $25 gift card
item.description: The forthcoming MacBook Neo is certainly compelling — at least for the right person. One could argue that buying a last-gen MacBook Air is a better bet in most instances; however, if you’re still...

item.title: Preparing for the Quantum Era: Post-Quantum Cryptography Webinar for Security Leaders
item.description: Most organizations assume encrypted data is safe. But many attackers are already preparing for a future where today’s encryption can be broken. Instead of trying to decrypt information now, they...

item.title: Cisco Confirms Active Exploitation of Two Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Vulnerabilities
item.description: Cisco has disclosed that two more vulnerabilities affecting Catalyst SD-WAN Manager (formerly SD-WAN vManage) have come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerabilities in question are...

item.title: Prediction markets in the news are a dangerous gamble
item.description: Today on Decoder, let’s talk about prediction markets, which continue to insert themselves into the news cycle and the news itself in increasingly weird, unsettling, and potentially illegal ways....

item.title: The Download: an AI agent’s hit piece, and preventing lightning
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Online harassment is entering its AI era Scott Shambaugh...

item.title: Ikea’s Matter-compatible smart bulbs are now available in the US
item.description: After being announced last November, Ikea’s Matter-compatible smart home collection has been slowly trickling into its stores around the world over the past few months. Despite some early...
